basic_details.job_title: NMPB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Accountant, Research Officer and More Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Botany or Pharmacognosy or Agriculture or Agronomy or Forestry, Master's degree in Botany/ Pharmacognosy, Five years' experience in administration, establishment and accounts matters, Master's degree in Botany/Pharmacy (with Pharmacognosy), Master's degree of Science in Botany or Pharmacognosy or Forestry or Agriculture or Horticulture or Medicinal Plants or Bio Technology or Pharmacy, Nine weeks training in Cash and Accounts
qualification.details: Deputy Adviser (Medicinal Plants): Master's degree in Botany or Pharmacognosy or Agriculture or Agronomy or Forestry from a recognized University or Institute or equivalent with ten years post qualification experience of working in the areas of research, development, policy, programs and implementation relating to medicinal plants. Assistant Adviser (Botany): Master's degree in Botany/ Pharmacognosy from a recognized University or equivalent with five years' experience of working in the field of development of propagation of medicinal plants, particularly used in Ayurveda, Unani and Homoeopathy. Finance & Administrative Officer: Five years' experience in administration, establishment and accounts matters. Research Officer (Botany): Master's degree in Botany/Pharmacy (with Pharmacognosy as the main subject) of a recognized University or equivalent with two years' experience of identification of drugs and medicinal plants used in Indian Systems of medicine. Assistant Research Officer: Master's degree of Science in Botany or Pharmacognosy or Forestry or Agriculture or Horticulture or Medicinal Plants or Bio Technology or Pharmacy (with Pharmacognosy as a main subject) from a recognized University or institute or equivalent with knowledge of computer operation. Accountant: Senior Secretariat Assistant (SSA) of Central Secretariat Clerical Service (CSCS) in Level-4 with eight years’ regular service and nine weeks training in Cash and Account or equivalent with two years' experience in cash, accounts and budget work.

salary_details.details: Deputy Adviser (Medicinal Plants): Pay Matrix Rs. 78,800-2,09,200 in Level-12 Assistant Adviser (Botany): Pay Matrix Rs. 67,700-2,08,700 in Level-11 Finance & Administrative Officer: Pay Matrix Rs. 67,700-2,08,700 in Level-11 Research Officer (Botany): Pay Matrix Rs. 56,100-1,77,500 in Level-10 Assistant Research Officer: Pay Matrix Rs. 35,400-1,12,400 in Level-6 Accountant: Pay Matrix Rs. 35,400-1,12,400 in Level-6

selection_process: Deputation through proper channel Screening of applications Selection Committee assessment
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NMPB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ayush.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the National Medicinal Plants Board (NMPB) recruitment is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various posts on deputation in the National Medicinal Plants Board (NMPB) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NMPB Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts in NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced under NMPB Recruitment 2026 is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the posts in NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts in NMPB Recruitment 2026 ranges from Level-6 to Level-12, with specific pay matrices detailed for each post in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, but generally include Master's degrees in Botany, Pharmacognosy, Agriculture, Forestry, Pharmacy, or related fields, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NMPB Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves deputation through the proper channel, screening of applications, and assessment by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for NMPB Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of the National Medicinal Plants Board, which is accessible via the Ayush Ministry website: https://ayush.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form for NMPB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the application form is mentioned in the official notification PDF. Candidates are advised to carefully check the notification for the correct postal address.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the National Medicinal Plants Board (NMPB) recruitment is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
